center.name: 海灣群島省
center.summary: 海灣群島省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Caribbean dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Belize, the Cayman Islands, Colombia (San Andrés island), Honduras (Bay Islands), Jamaica, and Mexico (Yucatán Peninsula)

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Belize, the Cayman Islands, Colombia (San Andrés island), Honduras (Bay Islands), Jamaica, and Mexico (Yucatán Peninsula)
